description: A container for a batch of metrics with optional shared attributes

common.description: Shared attributes applied to all metrics in this data object unless overridden at the metric level

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds for all metrics in this batch

interval.ms.description: Default measurement interval in milliseconds for count and summary metrics

attributes.description: Key-value pairs applied to all metrics in the batch. Values can be strings, numbers, or booleans.

metrics.description: Array of individual metric data points

value.description: The metric value. For gauge and count, a number. For summary, an object with count, sum, min, and max fields.

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in milliseconds. Overrides the common timestamp for this metric.

interval.ms.description: Measurement interval in milliseconds. Required for count and summary types.

attributes.description: Additional key-value attributes for this metric point

title: MetricDataObject
